headline: Jim Cramer Suggests Waiting for Post Earnings Dip Before Buying American Express
summary: American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s recent Mad Money game plan. Ahead of the upcoming earnings report, Cramer mentioned the company and said: American Express reports, too. And I want to tell you that this one almost always seems to retreat when we see the numbers and then runs […]
